title: EasyShopGUI
description: The Only Shop Plugin you ever need.
body:
EasyShopGUI

A next-generation GUI Shop Plugin for Minecraft servers (1.8 – 1.21.x)

EasyShopGUI is a modern, lightweight, and feature-rich shop system designed for Survival, PvP, Factions, and Network servers. With dynamic pricing, AI-driven economy balancing, multi-currency support, and full GUI customization, it’s built to give your players the best shopping experience possible.

✨ Features

✅ Supports 1.8 – 1.21.x

✅ Fully customizable GUIs, categories, and items

✅ AI Marketplace with supply & demand pricing

✅ Paper Cheque System (withdraw money into tradeable items)

✅ Bedrock-compatible (perfect for crossplay servers)

✅ NPC Shops with Citizens integration

✅ ShopStands (physical shop stands)

✅ Unlimited pages & categories

✅ Permission-based discounts & multipliers

✅ Essentials worth.yml importer

✅ 19+ pre-translated languages

✅ DiscordSRV logging

✅ PlaceholderAPI expansion

🚀 Advanced Systems
🤖 AI Marketplace

Dynamic pricing based on supply & demand, keeping your server’s economy balanced.

💵 Paper Cheques

Withdraw server money into tradeable physical notes, fully secure and dupe-protected.

🔍 Smart Search

Search items by name, category, or type – even with typos.

📊 Analytics & Logs

Track transactions, player spending history, and exportable logs.

📋 Commands

/shop → Open main shop

/shop <section> → Open specific category

/sellall hand|inventory|<item> → Quick selling

/sellgui → Drop-to-sell inventory

/withdraw <amount> → Create money cheque

/eshop additem|edititem|addsection → In-game management

/sreload → Reload plugin

🔐 Permissions

easyshopgui.admin → Admin commands

easyshopgui.discount.<group> → Custom discounts

easyshopgui.multiplier.<group> → Sell multipliers

EconomyShopGUI.shop.<section> → Control shop access

⚙️ Setup

Requirements:

Spigot/Paper/Purpur (1.8 – 1.21.x)

Vault + Economy plugin (EssentialsX, CMI, etc.)

Java 8+

Installation:

Place EasyShopGUI.jar in /plugins/

Restart server

Configure with /eshop or YAML files

🌍 Integrations

Economy: Vault, EssentialsX, CMI, TokenManager

Spawners: EpicSpawners, SilkSpawners, UpgradeableSpawners

Enchantments: EcoEnchants, AE, ExcellentEnchants

Other: PlaceholderAPI, Citizens, DiscordSRV

💬 Why Choose EasyShopGUI?

🎯 Player-friendly & intuitive

⚡ Optimized for performance

🌍 Supports Bedrock + Java crossplay

🛡️ Actively updated & stable

🏗️ Perfect for Survival, PvP, Factions, and Network servers

📥 Download & Start Today

EasyShopGUI is the complete shop solution for Minecraft servers.
Bring your economy to life with an intelligent, immersive, and customizable shop system.
